# motionforge

> A deterministic, browser-native video scene engine. The canonical video is a serializable JSON scene document; rendering is a pure function of (scene, frame). Agents author and patch scene JSON; the engine validates, lays out, and renders it.

## Mental model

```txt
scene JSON + frame -> parseScene -> evaluateScene (keyframes) -> layoutScene (boxes) -> renderStill (Canvas2D) -> pixels
```

- Time is integer frames at `scene.fps`, never wall-clock seconds.
- A node is active for `[from, from + duration)` in its parent's local timeline; children's clocks restart when the parent appears.
- Keyframe `frame` values are local to the node. Numeric values interpolate (easing: `linear`, `easeIn`, `easeOut`, `easeInOut`); string values step.
- Node `id`s are unique across the scene by contract — patch and diff scenes by id.

## Hard rules

- Never use wall-clock time or unseeded randomness in anything that feeds rendering.
- Only use style properties from the support matrix (docs/scene-format.md). Unknown properties fail validation — this is intentional; do not work around it.
- Prefer data keyframes over imperative per-frame code.
- After editing a scene, re-validate with `validateScene()` and read the errors; they state the path, the problem, and the fix.

## Minimal valid scene (JSON)

```json
{
  "schemaVersion": 0,
  "width": 1080,
  "height": 1920,
  "fps": 30,
  "duration": 90,
  "assets": {},
  "nodes": [
    {
      "id": "bg",
      "type": "div",
      "style": { "width": "100%", "height": "100%", "backgroundColor": "#101820" }
    },
    {
      "id": "title",
      "type": "text",
      "text": "Hello motionforge",
      "style": {
        "position": "absolute",
        "left": 64,
        "right": 64,
        "top": 800,
        "fontSize": 72,
        "color": "#ffffff",
        "textAlign": "center"
      },
      "animations": [
        {
          "kind": "keyframes",
          "property": "opacity",
          "frames": [
            { "frame": 0, "value": 0 },
            { "frame": 12, "value": 1, "easing": "easeOut" }
          ]
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

Node types: `div`, `text` (requires `text`), `img` and `video` (require `assetId` pointing at `scene.assets`; drawing not yet implemented). Lengths: number = px, `"50%"` = of parent, `"64px"`.

Styles implemented today: `width`, `height`, `position` (`relative`/`absolute`), `left`/`top`/`right`/`bottom`, `inset`, `padding`, `display: "flex"`, `flexDirection`, `gap`, `justifyContent` (`flex-start`/`center`/`flex-end`), `alignItems` (`flex-start`/`center`/`flex-end`), `backgroundColor`, `background` (solid or simple two-stop linear-gradient), `borderRadius` (no child clipping), `opacity`, `transform` (`translate`/`scale`/`rotate`), `fontSize`, `fontFamily`, `fontWeight`, `color`, `textAlign`, `textShadow`. Validated but not yet rendered: `margin`, `min/max` sizes, `transformOrigin`, `fontStyle`, `lineHeight`, `letterSpacing`, `objectFit`, `objectPosition`, `justifyContent: "space-between"`, `alignItems: "stretch"`.

## Example validation errors

```txt
nodes.1.id: Duplicate node id "title". Node ids must be unique across the scene so tools can patch and diff nodes reliably.
nodes.0.style: Unsupported style property. motionforge v0 supports a curated CSS-like subset; move unsupported behavior into supported transforms, layout, or custom draw nodes.
nodes.2.assetId: img nodes require an assetId that points at scene.assets.
```

## APIs

- `@motionforge/schema`: `parseScene(json)` (throws `SceneValidationError`), `validateScene(json)` (returns `{ ok, scene | errors }`), `sceneJsonSchema()` (JSON Schema draft-07; also shipped as `scene.schema.json`).
- `@motionforge/core`: `composition()`, `div()`, `text()`, `img()`, `video()` builders → `.toJSON()`; `evaluateScene(scene, frame)`, `layoutScene(resolved)`.
- `@motionforge/renderer-canvas2d`: `renderStill(ctx2d, scene, frame)`.
- `@motionforge/export`: `detectExportCapability()`, `renderFrameSequence({ scene, context, onFrame })` — deterministic frame loop with µs timestamps; `exportVideo()` not yet implemented.

## Docs

- [Scene format spec and style support matrix](docs/scene-format.md): the canonical contract.
- [JSON Schema for scenes](packages/schema/scene.schema.json): validate structurally without running code.
- [M0 roadmap](docs/m0-roadmap.md): what is in and out of scope right now.
- [Testing strategy](docs/testing-strategy.md): how changes must be verified.
- [Contributing and coding standards](CONTRIBUTING.md): determinism rules for the render path.
